subcodes.first_line: The divine melody hath joined with the celestial Trumpet, and the rapture of the Eternal Sovereign's Dove hath alighted upon the branches of the Divine Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نقره الهی بر ناقور صمدانی مقرون شد و جذبه حمامه سلطان ازلی بر اغصان سدره
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @love of God, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @contention and conflict
